chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3532 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge DIRECTION For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 06.09.2021. Mr. Anwas Ali Tunio, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution alleging that he was enrolled by Hamdard University, Karachi, Faculty of Humanities & Social Sciences and fulfilled all requirements towards obtaining an M.Phil. Degree. The grievance espoused by him is that he has nonetheless not been awarded the Degree Certificate and seeks that the University be directed to issue the same in his favour. As it transpires, the University in question is a private Institution and not amenable to issuance of a writ under Article 199. Furthermore, the Petitioner had even otherwise preferred Constitutional Petition No.D-709/2018 before the Circuit Court at Larkana on the same subject, which was dismissed as not pressed vide order dated 30.10.2019. On query posed, learned counsel for the Petitioner was unable to advance any satisfactory explanation on these aspects. Under the given circumstances, no case for issuance of a writ stands made out. The instant Petition stands dismissed accordingly. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUBASHIR
